title: Senior Financial Analyst - HDFC Ergo - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - HDFC Ergo - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, HDFC Ergo in Pune is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About HDFC Ergo:
HDFC Ergo is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Forecasting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Ergo!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
